permits.description: Gut renovation of interior and exterior of existing buildings. Renovating intetior with new insulation, board/plaster and finishes. Strip and remove existing siding and roof. Install new siding and roofing. Install new windows and exterior doors. Dig out basement approximately 2' to add ceiling height.
permits.score_reasons: high cost ($497,000); keyword: gut; minor: insulation

llm_assessment.reasoning: The property is undergoing a massive $497,000 gut renovation of the entire interior and exterior, including basement excavation to increase ceiling height, which represents a complete whole-house modernization typical of a prep-for-sale project.
